description: Opening the date format select dropdown in document settings shows a scrollable list that does not extend beyond the viewport (max-height is constrained via max-h-60).
steps: Click the button with title 'Settings' (settings trigger button)
Wait for the heading 'Document Settings' to appear in the dialog
Click the 'Date Format' select dropdown to open it
Take screenshot to verify the dropdown list is visible and contained within the viewport with a scrollable area (not extending beyond screen bounds)
